title: knows-cloud/paperless-iq

title: drluckyspin/lclaude
summary: lclaude is a wrapper utility to simplify running Claude Code with an Ollama local LLM.

title: Kemo458/ai-player-feedback-triage
summary: AI-powered player feedback triage with Google Play import, local Qwen analysis, realtime operations, and internal feedback collection.

summary: HIRIS — Home Intelligent Reasoning & Integration System. AI-powered Home Assistant add-on.

title: harshitwandhare/atlas-ra
summary: ATLAS — multi-team AI agent system with three-tier memory, critic-verified task loops, approval-gated host execution, and a live dashboard. Python + Next.js.

title: bloodworks-io/phlox
summary: Open source, local first AI medical agent for desktop and web.

title: YavarGd/AEDA
summary: Local-first modular AI assistant for Windows, built with C#, WinUI 3, Ollama, and SQLite.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

summary: Open-source AI coding agent for VS Code — plans, edits, and runs tasks with your approval. Bring your own model: OpenRouter, or a local one via Ollama, vLLM, or LM Studio.

title: logancammish/ollama-gui-interface
summary: A non-official GUI interface for local Ollama bots written in Rust, designed to give you control.

title: mobitouchOS/MaIN.NET
summary: NuGet package designed to make LLMs, RAG, and Agents first-class citizens in .NET

title: MariusYvard/corparius
summary: Self-hosted framework for autonomous AI micro-companies. Describe a business in plain language and corparius runs it as scheduled cognitive agents (a CEO plus nine operational roles), guarded by a budget and loop firewall, with local-first LLM routing.

title: famclaw/famclaw
summary: Self-hosted family AI gateway with parental controls. Runs on Linux, macOS, and Android (Termux) — Raspberry Pi, mini PC, old laptop, homelab server, even a phone. Telegram, Discord, web. Privacy-first, works with any LLM (local or cloud), OPA content filtering, MCP skill scanning.

title: lidge-jun/opencodex

summary: Secure Multi-Agent AI Framework

summary: My First Ai Agent, wip

title: bennybuoy/llamaherd
summary: Agent-first Ollama Cloud proxy: multi-key routing, usage tracking, live dashboard, client API keys, and rate limits.

title: mekedron/ClipSlop
summary: AI writing tool for macOS — fix grammar, translate, rewrite, format text with a hotkey. Chain prompts into pipelines. Works with ChatGPT, Anthropic, Ollama. Free and open-source.
